messages.content:
让杜帝管吧
田主任
这床不如我来管吧
我怕杜帝
平时工作太忙了
忙不过来
translate this

Let Du Di handle it.
Director Tian
It's better if I take care of this bed.
I'm afraid of Du Di.
He is busy with work all the time.
Too busy to handle it.

杜帝忙不过来
你更忙不过来了
你本来就是主治
干住院总的活了

Du Di is too busy to handle it.
You are even busier than him.
You are the attending physician after all.
You have to take care of all the hospital work.
你本来就是主治医生干住院总的活了
You are the attending physician and responsible for all inpatient work.
你本来就是主治干住院总的活了还要专门管床
As the attending physician, it is indeed your responsibility to oversee the overall care of the inpatients, including managing their beds.
住院医生管床 what does that mean?

"住院医生管床" means "residents manage the beds" in English. In a hospital setting, residents, who are licensed physicians undergoing specialized training, are often responsible for managing the care of patients admitted to the hospital, which includes overseeing the allocation and management of beds for those patients.
how can I say this more naturally and natively?
A more natural and native way to express "住院医生管床" could be "It is the duty of resident doctors to manage the beds of inpatients."

还要专门管床
这不是住院医干的活吗
It is part of the responsibilities of a resident doctor to specifically manage the beds of inpatients.
护士长
护士长，我需要您帮忙管理床位事务。作为住院医生，我负责病人的诊断和治疗，但床位管理是您的职责之一。我需要您的协助来协调床位分配和确保病人的合适安排。谢谢您的支持和合作。
how to say it in english

Nurse Manager,

I need your assistance in managing bed assignments. As a resident doctor, my responsibilities primarily involve the diagnosis and treatment of patients. However, bed management falls under your purview. I kindly request your support in coordinating bed allocations and ensuring appropriate arrangements for our patients. Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely, [Your Name]
translate this: 既然他说了他有精力去额外分担一些，我们就应该相信他
Since he has mentioned that he has the energy to take on some additional responsibilities, we should trust him.
你自己看着办吧
You can handle it yourself.
行 我再等等
Alright, I'll wait a bit longer.
你管我就放心了
I'll take care of it, so you can rest assured.
是你管我就不用多问了
If you're taking care of it, then I don't need to ask any further questions.
他在手术上从来没有失败过
He has never experienced a failure in surgical procedures.
